prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流综合类大学；软科主榜2026年约第13名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第11–13名区间，学校层次极高；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（论文数据造假等），可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制；抖音热度较热（总排名第29），关注度中等；历史投档异常方面，2022年 多省爆冷断档、2023年投档线异常，但2025年声誉评价转为偏正面，舆情有所改善；拥有23个A-及以上学科，代表性学科包括工商管理A+、生态学A+、中国语言 文学A、临床医学A-、数学A、物理学A、计算机科学与技术A-等，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等 工科专业持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学推荐，中山大学在上述领域均有强势学科布局；青海省2026年普通高考总人数约48000人（不确定），较2025年历史类+物理类合计47 669人略增，物理类占比约64%，估算2026物理类考生约30720人，较2025年30457人微增约0.86%，竞争略有加剧；中山大学位于广东省广州市，属华南地区，对西北省份青海考生而言地域偏好中等；该校在本省招生占比极小（约0.01%量级）， 地域因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招4.5%、本省物理类考生微增、声誉偏负面轻微抑制等因素，在2025年基准760名基础上预 计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位次约796名，区间700–892名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 398 → 594 → 592 → 597 → 760, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 362 places in the past 4 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 760, a significant backward shift of 163 places compared to 2024, indicating intensified competition; the provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 29 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 22 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 23, a slight expansion of about 4.5% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; ranked approximately 13th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 11th–13th range in recent years, indicating a very high school level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (paper data fabrication, etc.), which may have a slight dampening effect on application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity is relatively high (total ranking 29), with moderate attention; regarding historical admission anomalies, there were cold spots and gaps in multiple provinces in 2022, and abnormal admission cutoffs in 2023, but the 2025 reputation evaluation turned slightly positive, with improved public opinion; it has 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including representative disciplines such as Business Administration A+, Ecology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Clinical Medicine A-, Mathematics A, Physics A, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, which strongly attracts applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, as are clinical medicine and stomatology; Sun Yat-sen University has strong disciplinary layouts in these fields; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is about 48,000 (uncertain), a slight increase from the 2025 total of 47,669 for history and physics categories combined, with physics category accounting for about 64%; it is estimated that there will be about 30,720 physics category candidates in 2026, a slight increase of about 0.86% from 30,457 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, in the South China region, with moderate regional preference for candidates from the northwestern province of Qinghai; the university's enrollment proportion in this province is extremely small (on the order of 0.01%), so regional factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion of 4.5% in the 2026 plan, the slight increase in physics category candidates in the province, and the slight dampening effect of the negative reputation, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 760; the predicted minimum ranking is about 796, with a range of 700–892.
